user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the minimum number of employees required to initiate a layoff, so that the layoff process is only triggered when the threshold is met.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Layoff Approvers screen; When I enter the minimum number of employees required to initiate layoff and save; Then the threshold is stored and enforced

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of layoff approvers by location, so that I can see who approves layoffs in each location.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Layoff Approvers screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing location(s) and approver(s), or a no-records message when none are configured

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new layoff approver for a location, so that layoff requests route to the correct approver.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Layoff Approvers screen; When I click Add new layoff approver and specify the location and approver; Then the approver is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next step, so that I can complete the exit configuration workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured layoff approvers; When I click Save & Next; Then my changes are saved and I advance to the next step
